subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou at all times be turned toward the Sun of the horizon of Manifestation and drink from the pure celestial waters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در کل احیان بشمس افق ظهور متوجه باشی و از کوثر طهور بیاشامی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
